title: Random
description:
This is just a mod I and Viboten made, we add items that we find funny or cool.

This mod will probably not be updated alot if at all.
body:
![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd4476e7a7614f2f3e63a68db00e1141dcac7acb.png)
This is just a mod I and Viboten made. It'll likely will update it about once a week, We add items that we find funny or cool.

This mod adds some ores and other random features from our heart's content. It contains other items such as throwable bananas, wands, meteors and LOTS of explosions. It will get updated regularly and can be used as a fun side mod along others for a slight spark in your world.

Credit to Viboten for the logo.


**Im probably not going to make anything for a bit or a long time. Have a great day!**
